title: Pap for a pup
description: GEORGE NEWS - As the cost of dog and cat...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - As the cost of dog and cat food continues to rise, rescues are struggling to keep up with the ever-growing need. At Oudtshoorn Dogs in Need, we are finding practical ways to ensure no animal goes hungry.


> Maize meal can be used to help stretch dog and cat food in desperate times – and a single bag can go a long way.


By donating a bag of maize meal, you help us feed more animals in need. Every contribution makes a difference.

“Together, we can make sure no animal goes hungry.”


> If you would like to donate you can drop donations off at: Odin Charity Shop, Doneraile Center, Doneraile Street, George Central.


For more information whatsapp Michelle at 084 409 1026 or Annalene at 079 501 2853.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
